infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FastPlan uses your camera to scan meals and food barcodes so it can log calories and macros for you.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FastPlan needs access to your photo library so you can pick an existing meal photo to log calories.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: FastPlan reads motion data to estimate your steps and active energy on Eat and Fast days.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: FastPlan reads your steps, distance and active energy from Apple Health to track activity automatically.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: FastPlan can write workouts you log into Apple Health so all your activity stays in sync.

plugins.cameraPermission: FastPlan uses your camera to scan meals and barcodes.
plugins.photosPermission: FastPlan uses your photo library to pick a meal photo to log.

plugins.cameraPermission: FastPlan uses your camera to scan barcodes on packaged foods.
